questions.question: Kitchen mein safe working temperature kaun sa hota hai?
questions.explanation: Professional kitchen ka ideal temperature 21-24 degrees Celsius hota hai jisse staff comfortable rahe aur food quality maintain rahe.

questions.question: Food poisoning rokne ke liye raw aur cooked food ko alag rakhna kya kahlaata hai?
questions.explanation: Cross contamination prevention se raw food ke bacteria cooked food mein nahi jaate aur food poisoning nahi hota.

questions.question: Kitchen utensils ko sanitize karne ke liye kitne temperature par paani use hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: 80-90 degrees Celsius ke paani se utensils properly sanitize hote hain aur bacteria mar jaate hain.

questions.question: HACCP ka full form kya hai?
questions.explanation: HACCP ek food safety management system hai jo hazards identify karta hai aur control points establish karta hai.

questions.question: Perishable food items ko kitne hours mein use karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Perishable items jaise milk, meat, fish ko 24 hours mein use karna chahiye nahi to woh spoil ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Kitchen mein hand washing ke liye soap aur paani ke baad kya karna chahiye?

options.C: Air dry karna ya clean towel use karna

questions.explanation: Hath dhone ke baad clean towel ya air dry karna chahiye taki bacteria na rahe.

questions.question: Food storage ke liye freezer ka temperature kaun sa hota hai?
questions.explanation: Freezer mein -12 se -18 degrees Celsius temperature hota hai jo food ko long time tak preserve rakhta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen knife ko sharpen karte samay kaunsa tool use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Honing steel se knife ke blade ko sharpen kiya jaata hai aur woh cutting mein efficient rahe.

questions.question: Professional kitchen mein chef ka uniform kaun se color ka hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: White uniform professional kitchen standard hai aur cleanliness ko represent karta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen mein fire extinguisher kaun sa type use hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Type ABC fire extinguisher sab types ke fires ko handle kar sakta hai aur kitchen mein sabse safe hai.

questions.question: Raw meat ko kitchen mein kaun se cutting board par cut karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Red color ka cutting board specifically raw meat ke liye use hota hai cross contamination se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Kitchen mein pest control ke liye kaun sa method use nahi hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Cooking ke samay pesticide spray nahi karna chahiye kyunki woh food ko contaminate kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen waste ko handle karte samay kaun sa practice galat hai?
questions.explanation: Waste ko kabhi open nahi rakhna chahiye kyunki us se bacteria aur pests aate hain.

questions.question: Kitchen equipment ki maintenance log book mein kya record kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Equipment maintenance log mein check dates aur repairs record kiye jaate hain equipment ki life badhaane ke liye.

questions.question: Shelf life ka matlab kya hota hai?

options.B: Kitne time tak item use ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Shelf life woh time period hai jis tak koi food item safe aur usable rahe.

questions.question: Kitchen mein first aid kit mein kaun si cheez hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Complete first aid kit mein bandages, antiseptic, pain relief aur gloves sab hona chahiye.

questions.question: Refrigerator mein food ko store karte samay kaun sa practice follow karna chahiye?

options.A: Sab cheez ek saath rakh do
options.B: Raw meat ko top shelf par rakho
options.C: Cooked food ko raw food se alag rakho
options.D: Vegetables ko meat ke saath rakho

questions.explanation: Cooked food ko raw food se alag rakna chahiye cross contamination se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Turmeric powder mein kaun sa active compound hota hai?
questions.explanation: Curcumin turmeric mein hota hai jo anti-inflammatory properties deta hai aur Indian cuisine mein widely use hota hai.

questions.question: Garam masala mein kaun se spices include hote hain?
questions.explanation: Garam masala mein cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, black pepper aur anya spices hote hain.

questions.question: Saffron kaun se plant se aata hai?
questions.explanation: Saffron Crocus sativus flower se aata hai aur duniya mein sabse expensive spice hai.

questions.question: Chili powder mein heat kaun se compound se aata hai?
questions.explanation: Capsaicin chili mein hota hai jo spicy taste deta hai aur heat create karta hai.

questions.question: Cumin seeds ka English name kya hai?
questions.explanation: Cumin seeds ka scientific name Cuminum cyminum hai aur jeera ke naam se bhi jaana jaata hai.

questions.question: Coriander powder mein kaun si aroma hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Coriander powder mein sweet aur citrus-like aroma hoti hai jo Indian dishes mein widely use hoti hai.

questions.question: Black cardamom aur green cardamom mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Black cardamom smoky flavor deta hai, green cardamom sweet
options.C: Black cardamom sweet hai, green cardamom bitter

questions.explanation: Black cardamom smoky aur strong flavor deta hai jabki green cardamom sweet aur aromatic hota hai.

questions.question: Asafoetida (Hing) ka use kaunse dishes mein zyada hota hai?
questions.explanation: Asafoetida vegetarian dishes aur lentils mein widely use hota hai digestive properties ke liye.

questions.question: Fenugreek leaves (Methi) ko kaun se form mein use kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Methi ko fresh leaves aur dried dono forms mein use kiya jaata hai Indian cooking mein.

questions.question: Ginger aur garlic paste banate samay kaun sa ratio use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Ginger aur garlic paste usually 1:1 ratio mein banaya jaata hai Indian recipes mein.

questions.question: Coconut milk banate samay kaun se parts use hote hain?
questions.explanation: Coconut milk kernel aur water dono ko blend karke banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Tamarind paste mein kaun sa taste hota hai?
questions.explanation: Tamarind paste mein sour aur tangy taste hota hai jo Indian curries mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Chaat masala mein kaun sa ingredient nahi hota?
questions.explanation: Chaat masala mein amchur, black salt, cumin hote hain lekin turmeric nahi hota.

questions.question: Panch phoron mein kaun se seeds hote hain?
questions.explanation: Panch phoron mein 5 seeds hote hain - cumin, coriander, fenugreek, fennel aur nigella.

questions.question: Kasuri methi ka use kaun se dishes mein zyada hota hai?
questions.explanation: Kasuri methi (dried fenugreek leaves) tandoori aur dry curries mein use hote hain unique flavor ke liye.

questions.question: Jaggery (Gur) kaun se plant se banaya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Jaggery sugarcane se banaya jaata hai aur Indian cuisine mein sweetness add karta hai.

questions.question: Ghee banate samay butter ko kaun se temperature par heat kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Ghee banate samay butter ko 110-120 degrees Celsius par heat kiya jaata hai water evaporate hone ke liye.

questions.question: Tempering (Tadka) technique mein kaun sa step pehle aata hai?

options.A: Spices ko oil mein add karna

questions.explanation: Tempering mein pehle oil ko heat kiya jaata hai, phir spices add kiye jaate hain aur finally curry mein dala jaata hai.

questions.question: Roasting technique se spices ko kaun se benefit milte hain?

options.B: Flavor aur aroma enhance hote hain

questions.explanation: Roasting se spices ka flavor aur aroma enhance hote hain aur woh zyada fragrant ban jaate hain.

questions.question: Marinating technique mein meat ko kitne time ke liye soak kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Marinating usually 1-2 hours ke liye ki jaati hai jisse flavors meat mein penetrate ho jayen.

questions.question: Tandoori cooking technique mein kaun sa equipment use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Tandoori cooking mein Tandoor (traditional clay oven) use hota hai jo high temperature par cook karta hai.

questions.question: Steaming technique mein food ko kaun se medium mein cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Steaming mein food ko steam se cook kiya jaata hai jo healthy cooking method hai.

questions.question: Pressure cooking se food ko kaun sa benefit milta hai?

options.C: Time aur fuel dono kam hote hain

questions.explanation: Pressure cooking mein time aur fuel dono kam hote hain kyunki high pressure se food jaldi cook hota hai.

questions.question: Braising technique mein meat ko kaun se medium mein cook kiya jaata hai?

options.C: Pehle sear karna phir liquid mein

questions.explanation: Braising mein meat ko pehle sear kiya jaata hai phir liquid mein slow cook kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Sauteing technique mein kaun sa temperature use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Sauteing mein high heat use hota hai jisse food quickly cook ho aur color badal jaye.

questions.question: Simmering technique mein liquid ko kaun se state mein rakhna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Simmering mein liquid ko just below boiling point par rakhna chahiye slow cooking ke liye.

questions.question: Blanching technique kaun se vegetables ke liye use hoti hai?
questions.explanation: Blanching green vegetables aur legumes ke liye use hoti hai color aur texture preserve karne ke liye.

questions.question: Reduction technique mein liquid ko kaun se purpose se heat kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Volume kam karne aur flavor concentrate karne ke liye
options.C: Liquid ko cool karne ke liye
options.D: Liquid ko freeze karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Reduction mein liquid ko heat karke volume kam kiya jaata hai jisse flavor concentrate ho jaye.

questions.question: Deep frying mein oil ka temperature kaun sa hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Deep frying mein oil ka temperature 170-180 degrees Celsius hona chahiye perfect frying ke liye.

questions.question: Shallow frying aur deep frying mein kaun sa main difference hai?

options.B: Oil ki quantity aur depth different hai

questions.explanation: Shallow frying mein kam oil use hota hai aur deep frying mein zyada oil use hota hai.

questions.question: Dry roasting technique mein kaun sa equipment use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Dry roasting mein dry pan ya tava use hota hai bina oil ke spices ko roast karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ghee tempering mein ghee ko kaun se temperature par heat kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Ghee tempering mein ghee ko 120-130 degrees Celsius par heat kiya jaata hai spices ko fragrant karne ke liye.

questions.question: Emulsification technique mein kaun se ingredients combine hote hain?

options.C: Oil aur water like immiscible liquids

questions.explanation: Emulsification mein oil aur water jaise immiscible liquids ko combine kiya jaata hai sauce banane ke liye.

questions.question: Caramelization technique mein kaun sa ingredient use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Caramelization mein sugar ko heat karke brown color aur sweet flavor create kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: North Indian cuisine mein kaun se bread ka use zyada hota hai?
questions.explanation: North Indian cuisine mein roti, naan, paratha jaise breads widely use hote hain.

questions.question: South Indian cuisine mein kaun se dish famous hai?
questions.explanation: South Indian cuisine mein idli aur dosa sabse famous dishes hain.

questions.question: Bengali cuisine mein kaun sa fish dish famous hai?
questions.explanation: Bengali cuisine mein hilsa fish curry (ilish maach) sabse famous dish hai.

questions.question: Gujarati cuisine mein kaun sa vegetable dish famous hai?
questions.explanation: Gujarati cuisine mein undhiyu ek traditional vegetable dish hai jo festival ke time par banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Maharashtrian cuisine mein kaun sa spice blend use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Maharashtrian cuisine mein goda masala use hota hai jo unique aur aromatic blend hai.

questions.question: Punjabi cuisine mein kaun sa dairy product widely use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Punjabi cuisine mein yogurt aur paneer widely use hote hain curries aur dishes mein.

questions.question: Kerala cuisine mein kaun sa ingredient signature ingredient hai?
questions.explanation: Kerala cuisine mein coconut ek signature ingredient hai jiska use sabhi dishes mein hota hai.

questions.question: Mughlai cuisine mein kaun sa cooking style use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Mughlai cuisine mein slow cooking aur marinating techniques widely use hote hain.

questions.question: Chettinad cuisine kaun se state se relate hai?
questions.explanation: Chettinad cuisine Tamil Nadu se relate hai aur spicy aur flavorful dishes ke liye famous hai.

questions.question: Awadhi cuisine mein kaun sa meat dish famous hai?
questions.explanation: Awadhi cuisine mein biryani aur kebabs sabse famous dishes hain.

questions.question: Hyderabadi biryani mein kaun sa rice use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Hyderabadi biryani mein basmati rice use hota hai jo long grain aur aromatic hota hai.

questions.question: Goan cuisine mein kaun sa spice blend use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Goan cuisine mein Goan masala aur coconut use hote hain jisse unique flavor aata hai.

questions.question: Rajasthani cuisine mein kaun sa main ingredient use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Rajasthani cuisine mein dairy products aur spices main ingredients hain.

questions.question: Odisha cuisine mein kaun sa fish dish famous hai?
questions.explanation: Odisha cuisine mein machha bhaja aur fish curries famous hain.

questions.question: Kashmiri cuisine mein kaun sa spice blend use hota hai?
questions.explanation: Kashmiri cuisine mein saffron aur Kashmiri masala use hote hain jisse unique aroma aata hai.

questions.question: Telangana cuisine mein kaun sa rice dish famous hai?
questions.explanation: Telangana cuisine mein Hyderabadi biryani sabse famous rice dish hai.

questions.question: Himachali cuisine mein kaun sa meat dish traditional hai?
questions.explanation: Himachali cuisine mein mutton curry aur trout fish traditional dishes hain.

questions.question: Paneer tikka banate samay paneer ko kaun se temperature par cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Paneer tikka ko tandoor mein 180-200 degrees Celsius par cook kiya jaata hai perfect texture ke liye.

questions.question: Chana masala mein kaun sa ingredient main hota hai?
questions.explanation: Chana masala mein chickpeas (kabuli chana) main ingredient hote hain.

questions.question: Sambar powder mein kaun se ingredients nahi hote?
questions.explanation: Sambar powder mein ginger aur garlic nahi hote, sirf dry spices hote hain.

questions.question: Aloo gobi banate samay potatoes aur cauliflower ko kaun se size mein cut kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Aloo gobi mein potatoes aur cauliflower ko medium cubes mein cut kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Baingan bharta banate samay eggplant ko pehle kaun se method se cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Baingan bharta mein eggplant ko pehle roast ya grill kiya jaata hai smoky flavor ke liye.

questions.question: Tandoori chicken ko kaun sa marinade use karke prepare kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Tandoori chicken ko yogurt, spices aur lemon juice se marinate kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Butter chicken mein kaun sa ingredient cream ke saath add hota hai?
questions.explanation: Butter chicken mein tomato aur butter dono add hote hain creamy sauce banane ke liye.

questions.question: Shahi tukda banate samay bread ko kaun se oil mein fry kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Shahi tukda mein bread ko ghee mein fry kiya jaata hai rich flavor ke liye.

questions.question: Dal makhani banate samay kaun se lentils use hote hain?

options.C: Black kidney beans aur red kidney beans

questions.explanation: Dal makhani mein black kidney beans (urad) aur red kidney beans use hote hain.

questions.question: Rogan josh mein kaun se meat ko use kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Rogan josh mein lamb aur goat meat use hote hain slow cooking ke liye.

questions.question: Nihari banate samay meat ko kaun se time ke liye slow cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Nihari mein meat ko 6-8 hours slow cook kiya jaata hai tender aur flavorful banane ke liye.

questions.question: Korma mein kaun sa ingredient creamy texture deta hai?
questions.explanation: Korma mein yogurt aur cream creamy texture dete hain.

questions.question: Vindaloo curry kaun se type ka hota hai?
questions.explanation: Vindaloo curry very spicy aur tangy hoti hai jisme vinegar aur chili use hote hain.

questions.question: Chole bhature mein chole ko kaun se time ke liye soak kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Chole bhature mein chole ko 8-12 hours soak kiya jaata hai soft banane ke liye.

questions.question: Rajma curry banate samay rajma ko kaun se pressure mein cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Rajma curry mein rajma ko 2-3 whistles par cook kiya jaata hai soft banane ke liye.

questions.question: Malai kofta banate samay kofta ko kaun se medium mein cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Malai kofta mein kofta ko pehle fry kiya jaata hai golden brown banane ke liye.

questions.question: Fish curry banate samay fish ko kaun se temperature par cook kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Fish curry mein fish ko 90-100 degrees Celsius par cook kiya jaata hai jisse woh tender rahe.

questions.question: Kitchen mein mise en place ka matlab kya hota hai?

options.B: Sab ingredients aur utensils pehle se ready rakna

questions.explanation: Mise en place mein sab ingredients aur utensils pehle se ready rakhe jaate hain cooking shuru karne se pehle.

questions.question: Kitchen mein inventory management ka main purpose kya hota hai?

options.B: Wastage kam karna aur stock control

questions.explanation: Inventory management se wastage kam hota hai aur stock properly control hota hai.

questions.question: FIFO principle kitchen mein kaun se purpose ke liye use hoti hai?

options.B: First In First Out - older stock pehle use

questions.explanation: FIFO (First In First Out) principle se older stock pehle use hota hai aur freshness maintain hoti hai.

questions.question: Kitchen mein portion control kaun se purpose se kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Portion control se cost control hota hai aur har dish mein consistency maintain hoti hai.

questions.question: Kitchen staff ke liye kaun sa training sabse important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Food safety aur hygiene training kitchen staff ke liye sabse important hota hai.

questions.question: Kitchen equipment ka preventive maintenance kaun se interval par kiya jaata hai?
questions.explanation: Equipment ka preventive maintenance regular intervals par kiya jaata hai breakdown rokne ke liye.

questions.question: Kitchen mein menu planning kaun se factors ko consider karke kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Seasonal ingredients, availability, cost, customer preference

questions.explanation: Menu planning mein seasonal ingredients, availability, cost aur customer preference sab consider kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Kitchen mein waste reduction ke liye kaun sa practice follow kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Proper cutting techniques aur byproduct utilization

questions.explanation: Waste reduction ke liye proper cutting techniques aur byproduct utilization kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kitchen mein cost control ke liye kaun sa method use hota hai?

options.B: Portion control, waste management, proper inventory

questions.explanation: Cost control mein portion control, waste management aur proper inventory sab important hote hain.

questions.question: Kitchen mein communication kaun se level par sabse important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Kitchen mein puri team ke beech communication sabse important hota hai smooth operation ke liye.

questions.question: Kitchen mein time management kaun se purpose se important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Time management se on-time delivery hota hai aur customer satisfaction badhti hai.

questions.question: Kitchen mein quality control kaun se stage par kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Preparation, cooking aur plating har stage par

questions.explanation: Quality control preparation, cooking aur plating har stage par kiya jaata hai consistent quality ke liye.

questions.question: Kitchen mein customer feedback kaun se purpose se important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Customer feedback se improvement opportunities milte hain aur menu development mein help milti hai.

questions.question: Kitchen mein sustainability practices kaun se hote hain?

options.B: Waste reduction, local sourcing, energy efficiency

questions.explanation: Sustainability mein waste reduction, local sourcing aur energy efficiency sab include hote hain.

questions.question: Professional kitchen mein documentation kaun se purpose se important hota hai?
questions.explanation: Documentation se traceability, compliance aur continuous improvement possible hota hai.
